results.title: Kerry County Football League: Who needs what from the final two rounds of games
results.description: Much is still to be decided with regards to promotion and relegation across the seven divisions of the county football league with the penultimate round of games this weekend

results.title: Iran women learn schedule for 2026 Sitting Volleyball World Championships
results.description: TEHRAN - The schedule for the Iran women’s national sitting volleyball team at the 2026 World ParaVolley Sitting Volleyball World Championships has been confirmed, with Team Melli set to begin their campaign against Rwanda in Hangzhou, China.

results.title: Dario Herrera to officiate Iran vs. Belgium
results.description: TEHRAN - Argentine referee Dario Herrera will officiate the Belgium vs Iran match at the 2026 World Cup.

results.title: John Cook selected to Nebraska Athletics 2026 Hall of Fame class
results.description: Nebraska athletics announced its 2026 Hall of Fame class. Many notable former Huskers made the list, including former volleyball head coach John Cook.
